title: PassiveVision - Anti enderman aggro
description: Prevents endermen from getting aggro'd when you look at them
body:
## Passive vision
Tired of endermen chasing you just for looking at them?
Don't want to completely remove the feature either?
This mod is just for you!

### What does it do?
This mod adds a 'passive vision' enchantment which can be applied to helmets. When applied, you can stare at endermen without worrying about your life!

### Installation
* Install fabric
* Copy the mod jar along with the Fabric API into the `.minecraft/mods` folder

#### Contact
In case of any issues, bugs or even suggestions, you can contact me via
* Twitter - @ThatInfernal
* Discord - InfernalSpark#9157
* Reddit - u/Infernal_Spark

##### Thanks for checking it out!
